title: India’s gaming industry after PROGA: From grey zones to guardrails
description: A few years ago, India’s online gaming market felt like a fast-moving experiment. Real-money games proliferated, with skill and chance often sharing the same stage, and operators built large businesses while navigating a patchwork of state laws, court decisions, and shifting policy signals. That era is now giving way to something more structured. That era is now giving way to something more structured. With the coming of Promotion and Regulation of Online Gaming Act, 2025 (“PROGA”), the notified
